code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test28-MAY-2023Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, elevated bilirubin, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance and color, indicating possible renal and metabolic dysfunction. HbA1c is low, which may reflect recent hypoglycemia or anemia. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend further evaluation for acute or chronic kidney disease and metabolic disturbances.

coding.display: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
